title: Everything you need to know about Onvanta

items.a: Onvanta is an onboarding platform that makes new employees productive faster. It combines structured onboarding, spaced repetition flashcards and manager visibility in one system — built for growing teams.

items.q: What's the difference from an LMS?
items.a: An LMS (Learning Management System) focuses on courses and certificates. Onvanta focuses specifically on a new employee's first weeks: tasks, knowledge retention via flashcards, and visibility for managers on who is on track and who needs attention.

Onvanta uses spaced repetition: questions are repeated at the moment you're about to forget them. This builds lasting knowledge with minimal effort. Employees practice a few minutes daily via their dashboard.

At-risk detection flags employees who are falling behind on their onboarding — low flashcard activity, outstanding tasks or slow progress. Managers receive a weekly digest and can step in immediately.

items.q: How do I start a free trial?
items.a: Go to onvanta.io/signup, create an account and you can start immediately. No credit card required, no installation. You'll have your first onboarding template ready within 5 minutes.
From your admin dashboard go to Users → Invite. You send an email invitation and the employee creates their own account. You can also start an onboarding directly via Onboardings → New.
Yes. Onvanta has a library of standard onboarding templates per role and industry. Import them with one click and customise them to fit your own process and company style.
Most companies are up and running within one day. You create a template, invite your first employee and the onboarding runs. More extensive setup with multiple templates typically takes 2-3 hours.

Onvanta charges €24.99 per active onboardee per month. Managers and admins are always free — you only pay for employees who are actively going through their onboarding. See all details at onvanta.io/pricing.
An active onboardee is an employee with an ongoing onboarding in the current calendar month. Employees without an active onboarding — for example after completing it — don't count and cost nothing.
Yes. Managers and company admins don't count towards billing. You only pay for employees who are actively onboarding.
Yes, you can cancel on a monthly basis. There are no annual contracts or cancellation fees. Your account stays active until the end of the paid period.
All data is stored in the EU (Frankfurt, Germany) via Supabase. We do not leave the European Economic Area for data storage or processing.
Yes. Onvanta is designed with privacy by design. We only process data necessary for the service, offer a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) and comply with all GDPR requirements.
Yes. Via the admin dashboard you can request a full export of all employee data, onboarding progress and flashcard results in CSV format. Contact us for a complete data export.
